technologies.notes: Version 9.2.3 is recent. No critical remote CVEs found.
CVE-2025-5115 (CVSS 7.7) - HTTP/2 RST_STREAM DoS ≤12.0.24. Version obscured.
CVE-2025-54253 (CVSS 10.0) - Struts2 DevMode RCE. /adminui/debug NOT found. Locked down.

CVE-2026-3427 (CVSS 6.4): Stored XSS via jsonText block attribute in Yoast <= 27.1.1. Version 27.9 is technically vulnerable in terms of version range, but REST API is authenticated. Requires Contributor+ level access. Confirm via admin-ajax.php with valid cookies.
Version 28.0 confirmed via categories API yoast_head output. CVE-2026-3427 fixed at >27.1.1, CVE-2026-1293 fixed at 26.9. No known exploitable CVEs at this version.

Version 4.1.4 confirmed via elementorFrontendConfig JS object. CVE-2026-57619 (Sensitive Data Exposure) fixed exactly at 4.1.4. CVE-2026-49782 (Broken Access Control) fixed at 4.1.1. No known exploitable CVEs for 4.1.4.
Elementor Pro build date 20250513. Elementor Pro REST API exposed (/elementor-pro/v1/) but all endpoints require auth. No version number found in JS. Likely recent.

CVE-2025-12352 (CVSS 9.8): Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload/RCE <= 2.9.20. CVE-2026-48866 (CVSS 9.6): Path traversal/file deletion <= 2.10.0.1. Behind Cloudflare challenge — cannot probe directly. Try via Playwright or alternative access method.
CVE-2025-67950 (CVSS 8.5): Blind SQLi <= 4.9.1. CVE-2025-58650 (CVSS 5.4): Broken access control <= 4.8.7.1. Version 4.9.9 is past both fix versions. Behind Cloudflare challenge.
